GeneralConstructionPermits.DescriptionOfWork: CONSTRUCT 2 FEE SIMPLE TOWNHOMES PER PLANS

ServiceRequests.EXPLANATION: Do NOT file requests related to the May 2025 Tornado here.

Have Street Department inspectors look at a sidewalk or curb for repair, replacement, cite commercial properties, or queue a ramp for repair. If address is a residential property, request may be added to the 50/50 sidewalk repair program queue.

Have Street Department inspectors look at a sidewalk or curb for repair, replacement, cite commercial properties, or queue a ramp for repair. If address is a residential property, request may be added to the 50/50 sidewalk repair program queue.

ServiceRequests.PLAIN_ENGLISH_NAME_FOR_PROBLEMCODE: City tree or limb is down and blocking the right-of-way
ServiceRequests.EXPLANATION: A City tree or limb has fallen and is blocking a street, alley, sidewalk, or other right-of-way.
Seasonal Only. Service is available from March 1 through September 30.

Have Street Department inspectors look at a sidewalk or curb for repair, replacement, cite commercial properties, or queue a ramp for repair. If address is a residential property, request may be added to the 50/50 sidewalk repair program queue.
